timeline.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (346 MW wind + BESS)
timeline.detail: Goldwind's Baldin / Baldon Stage 2 wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting — 346 MW wind paired with battery in the CIS bid. RenewEconomy article refers to the project as 'Baldin'; the AEMO project ID is 'Baldon Wind Farm Stage 2'.

sources.title: Australia's biggest wind project among 19 winners (RenewEconomy)

timeline.title: Response to Submissions lodged with DPHI
timeline.detail: RTS lodged with NSW Department of Planning, Housing and Infrastructure. Project still awaiting Independent Planning Commission determination as of T7 award.

scheme_contracts.contract_type: CISA (federal underwriting) — wind + BESS hybrid bid

stakeholder_issues.detail: Response to Submissions lodged with DPHI May 2025; project still awaiting Independent Planning Commission determination at time of T7 award. CISA execution will be gated on planning approval.

stakeholder_issues.issue: Project name inconsistency — Baldin vs Baldon
stakeholder_issues.detail: RenewEconomy 2026-05-23 article refers to the project as 'Baldin'; AEMO Generation Information uses 'Baldon Wind Farm Stage 2'. Same Goldwind project, different spellings in the public record.
